candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue label; equals Total Revenue in preview and is a standard revenue line.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; duplicate of Turnover in preview, so use as fallback.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Using Turnover as primary revenue line, with Total Revenue as fallback because labels appear duplicated across years.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; appears in cost section above operating profit.

variables.notes: Chosen as the clearest cost of sales / direct service cost line.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component; personnel costs are standard SG&A-type operating expenses.
Likely overhead bucket and preferable to total rows, even though preview is blank.
R&D line exists but appears below EBIT / supplemental context, so do not include in SG&A to avoid misclassification.
Dedicated R&D supplemental line exists, but it is supplemental/below EBIT so should not be included in SG&A under the placement rule.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but preview is empty; per rules include it along with other overhead bucket(s) for coverage.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Per SG&A hierarchy, explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview, so included it plus overhead component rows for coverage. Excluded total rows such as Other Operating Expenses, Total and Total Operating Expense. Excluded R&D from XSGA because the identifiable R&D rows appear only in supplemental/below-EBIT context.

candidates.why: R&D-related but specifically amortization, not preferred for XRD if a direct R&D expense line exists.
Direct R&D label, but preview is empty and appears in supplemental section below EBIT.
Direct dedicated R&D expense line with populated values; although supplemental/below EBIT, still the best XRD proxy.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Using the dedicated R&D expense line as primary. It appears in supplemental/below-EBIT area, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Preferred direct interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but narrower subset of total interest expense.
Broader finance cost fallback if direct interest expense is missing.
Broader/less specific and preview empty; lower priority.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subset of lease interest; lower priority than the main Interest Expense line.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the direct interest expense line first, then broader finance expense lines as fallbacks. Excluded lease-interest subset from final priority to avoid selecting a partial interest measure ahead of broader lines.

candidates.why: Not book equity; this is an income statement/investment-related line.
Semantically appropriate, but preview is empty and not needed because Total Equity is populated and clearly excludes minority interest here.
Best available equity line; preview shows it excludes Minority Interest because Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest is separate.
Includes minority interest, so not appropriate for BE when MIB is mapped separately.
Balancing item, not a substantive equity line.
Balancing item, not a substantive equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not book equity.

variables.notes: Total Equity is used because it appears to exclude minority interest; Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest is a separate combined line.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not preferred when balance sheet minority interest exists.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred when balance sheet minority interest exists.
Direct balance sheet minority/non-controlling interest line; preferred for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not balance sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest balance sheet amount.
Combined equity plus minority interest, not the standalone MIB line.

variables.notes: Mapped to the standalone balance sheet minority interest line to pair with BE=Total Equity without double counting.
